_source_text:
MANHATTAN COMMUNITY BOARD 3
Full Board Meeting
Tuesday, May 14, 2024, 6:30 PM
Henry Street Settlement, 265 Henry Street, New York, NY 10002

AGENDA

Item 1. VOTE — ULURP No. C 240078 ZSM — Special Permit, 127 Chrystie Street

The Full Board will vote on the Land Use Committee's recommendation regarding ULURP No. C 240078 ZSM, a special permit application for 127 Chrystie Street, New York, NY 10002. The Land Use Committee recommended approval with conditions at its April 23, 2024 meeting. The special permit seeks authorization under ZR §74-713 for enlargement of a non-conforming residential building in a C4-4A district.

The Board's vote shall constitute its formal advisory recommendation to the City Planning Commission. No additional public comment period is provided.
title: VOTE — ULURP C 240078 ZSM — Special Permit, 127 Chrystie Street
summary: Community Board 3 (Manhattan) Full Board to vote on a special permit recommendation for 127 Chrystie Street, following a Land Use Committee recommendation of approval with conditions.
